title: from bad to good
description: this mod turns rotten flesh into leather
body:
Turn rotten flesh into leather with ease!
Rot to Leather is a simple and useful mod that adds a new furnace recipe to convert rotten flesh into leather, helping in situations where cows are scarce or book production is limited.

🔥 Features:
Place rotten flesh into a furnace.
Receive leather as the result after the smelting process.

• [My site](https://arthurorsi.vercel.app) •
